meta.name: AI Week Library - Light Theme
meta.description: Clean light mobile UI kit with a green brand accent (#5db075), white card surfaces, and a colorful data palette. Uses Inter font (not themeable).

chartColors._description: Vibrant palette extracted from the data/chart screens. Green brand color leads, followed by distinct hues for maximum differentiation.

backgrounds._description: Light UI with white cards, near-white containers, and a dark status bar for inverted surfaces.

--em-sem-background.label: Card / widget surface — white screen backgrounds

--em-sem-background--neutral.label: Page / container surface — bottom bar, panel backgrounds

--em-sem-background--muted.label: Pressed / low-emphasis — input border stroke areas

--em-sem-background--subtle.label: Hover / soft emphasis — image placeholder fills

--em-sem-background--inverted.label: Dark / inverted surface — iOS status bar dark fill

textColors._description: Dark text on light backgrounds. Primary is pure black, with progressively lighter grays for secondary roles.

--em-sem-text--muted.label: Secondary text — checkbox descriptions, body copy

--em-sem-text--neutral.label: Neutral emphasis — option labels, near-black UI text

--em-sem-text--inverted.label: Text on dark surfaces — white text on dark status bar

statusColors._description: Red-orange for errors (from the design's accent rectangles), brand green for success.

shadows._description: Cool-toned purple shadow from the design's card/BG drop shadow effect.
